summary: Add 307 Rust unit and integration tests for cclab-mamba core subsystems: runtime/class.rs (32), runtime/gc.rs (35), runtime/module.rs (22), lower/ast_to_hir.rs (109), resolve/pass.rs (44), stdlib/asyncio_mod.rs (12), stdlib/csv_mod.rs (13), stdlib/hashlib_mod.rs (12), tests/runtime_integration.rs (28). All tests use inline #[cfg(test)] modules co-located with source. Zero source logic changes — test-only additions. All 2401 + 307 = 2708 tests pass.
